name: Chasing Cassidy
developer: Troy Miller, Sam Buckley, Aaron Everson, Sam Yeadon, Aro Lee
short_description: Explore the west through the eyes of a writer and confront different civilians, outlaws and criminals with the hope that your conversation skills can make up for your complete lack of combat knowledge in this narratively driven adventure.
detailed_description:
Chasing Cassidy is a 3D first person narratively driven adventure game where you play as David Williams, a writer from England who has come in search of infamous outlaw Cassidy Miller in the West. Facing a country unfamiliar to him and criminals that could end his life in a second, David's conversational skills maybe his key to survival or lead him to an early grave.

EXPLORE THE WEST

Find what mysteries and people wait for you as you travel across the two unique towns of Stampton and Robertsville. Travel across the areas with speed on horse back or take your time on foot and immerse yourself in the local surroundings and atmosphere.

INTRODUCE YOURSELF TO THE LOCALS

Meet the unique characters that may help you or may target you. Make choices that will effect different character's outcomes and futures or that may even change your own. 

WILL YOU FIND HIM OR WILL HE FIND YOU?

Your choices will influence the world around you. So will you act with kindness and justice in mind or become just like the outlaws and criminals that you plan to write about, the choice is yours.
